prompt: Create a Venn diagram comparing students, workers, and entrepreneurs.
completion:
venn
  set A["Students"]
  set B["Workers"]
  set C["Entrepreneurs"]
  union A,B["Working Students"]
  union B,C["Employee Founders"]
  union A,B,C["Lifelong Builders"]
